heading: Discontinuation for unsatisfactory conduct or progress
label: 10305 Discontinuation for unsatisfactory conduct or progress
text: The Attorney General may discontinue assistance under this part when the Attorney General finds that, according to the regularly prescribed standards and practices of the educational institution, the recipient fails to maintain satisfactory progress as described in .section 1091(c) of title 20
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare, prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 3796d–4 of Title 42
